compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.author: Joe Oakhart
comments.body:
## Progress checkpoint (epic in_progress)

DONE — 4 of 14 stories, each closed + completion-verifier-signed, landed as a STACKED Gerrit series on branch worktree-dso-code-review-16 (base origin/main), awaiting the whole-stack submit at the end:
- f93a (glum-knave-chef) — eval code-review arm + code_review_* scorers + 4 eval specs (base/verify/tests/security) w/ dso-seeded no-fire+recall + nit-framing + Rule-5 baseline. Gerrit change 325.
- 4b56 (chewy-snare-tripe) — base linter-deference line + Pass-2 verifier discipline. Change 327.
- f983 (howl-cop-biome) — content-triggered overlay seam + deletion-impact overlay. Change 328. (Plan amended with a commit->overlay_union data-flow spec to clear a plan-review BLOCK.)
- 3c5d (van-taunt-quill) — scope-intent overlay (diff vs union of trailer tickets); ticket-blind; per-overlay context via CodeReviewBatchRunner.context_overrides. Change 329. (Plan amended with commit-message plumbing + per-overlay-context specs to clear two plan-review BLOCKs.)

REMAINING — 10 stories, all open, dependency order: da25 (conflict-marker DET detector), 7c58 (coach moves), 1669 (FP-ledger+telemetry), da8a parent + 0f8f (tests overlay) which unblocks the 5 specialists 1ead/3cb3/a010/d71f/f894. Then submit the whole Gerrit stack and close this epic.

INFRA UNBLOCKS discovered + landed on main (NOT in the epic stack):
- Bug sue-skimp-tear (454a, discovered_from this epic): rebar's LLM calls were routed through the local headroom proxy, which corrupted the agentic verify tool-loop into an empty stream -> INDETERMINATE, blocking ALL claims. Fixed (runner bypasses a loopback proxy); Gerrit change 320 MERGED. This is what made the plan-review + completion-verifier gates work at all.
- Bug lit-chasm-brake (c672): reconciler preflight mislabeled an unmapped Jira status as 'local status'; message corrected. Gerrit change 330 MERGED.

GATE MECHANICS learned: every ticket needs a fresh plan-review PASS to claim (attestations go stale when origin/main advances); overlay stories must keep OVERLAY_IDS + criteria_routing.json in sync AND add a base-prompt catalog bullet (WS1/WS2 drift guards); plan-review BLOCKs on new stories are usually under-specified data-flow — remediate by editing the ticket description, then re-review.

compiled_state.description:
## Context
A gap analysis (see ~/rebar_vs_dso_code_review_gap_report.md and session log warn/dso) compared
digital-service-orchestra's (dso) LLM code review to rebar's four-pass gate. dso's severity is
model-authored and governed by a large hand-tuned rubric plus five compensating adjudicators; rebar's
verdict is deterministic arithmetic over a narrow, independently-verified Pass-2. This epic adopts dso's
hard-won CALIBRATION CONTENT (checklists, false-positive guards, evidence discipline) into rebar's
STRUCTURE (find -> verify -> decide -> coach), WITHOUT importing dso's compensating mechanisms. Governing
principle (locked with user): domain-specific recall AND FP-guards live in each specialist overlay; the
generic Pass-2 verifier is never taught a single domain's rubric; anything dso front-loads into its finder
only because it lacks a universal verifier is either relocated to Pass 2 or dropped. Deterministic checks
are preferred for unambiguous polyglot facts; LLM find+verify for context-dependent judgment.

## Success Criteria
- Every prompt/detector change lands with a passing eval (no-fire + recall cases seeded from dso's
  documented FP incidents and defect classes) so calibration is regression-tested, not vibes.
- Measurable improvement vs a DEFINED baseline: story A records the current (pre-change) gate's
  findings/run, nit-rate, and FP/verify-drop rate over the eval corpus as the baseline; success = higher
  valid-finding recall and lower advisory nit/FP noise vs those recorded numbers, with NO new BLOCK source
  beyond the existing deterministic security detectors.
- rebar's four-pass architecture is preserved: deterministic verdict, generic Pass-2, coach-not-block,
  enforcement-in-types. No kernel/verification-contract change shared with plan-review.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Eval foundation (incl. an eval_solver code-review arm + gating scorers) exists and gates the rest.
- [ ] A pre-change baseline is recorded so the measurable-improvement criterion is checkable.
- [ ] Base prompt carries the experiment-backed positive linter-deference line only.
- [ ] Content-triggered overlay capability shipped (new ids registered in OVERLAY_IDS); deletion-impact
      and scope-intent overlays use it.
- [ ] tests overlay carries the full behavioral-testing standard (both halves); Pass 2 stays generic.
- [ ] Pass-2 verifier prompt upgraded (contradiction/caller/arithmetic/absence; prefer AST-LSP).
- [ ] All five specialist overlays (security, performance, api-compat, db-migrations, llm-prompts) enriched.
- [ ] conflict-marker deterministic detector wired as an advisory fail-open DET criterion.
- [ ] scope-intent overlay checks the diff against the UNION of all trailer-referenced tickets.
- [ ] FP-ledger convention, grounding-effort/health telemetry, coach moves, approach-viability note landed.
- [ ] Cross-patchset memory (#6) split to its own linked epic, not implemented here.
compiled_state.title: Adopt dso code-review calibration into rebar's four-pass gate
